runner: Claude Opus 4.8 via Claude Code Desktop (native harness)
notes: Run in Claude Code Desktop (Anthropic's native agent harness); separate native-harness counterpart to the VS Code Claude Code Opus entry. Three.js r0.160 via CDN ESM import map, with OrbitControls and EffectComposer/UnrealBloom post-processing. Four primitive-built, named-joint characters — Michael Jackson (red jacket, black fedora, single white glove), Pepe (green head, big eyes), Trump (navy suit, red tie, swept blond hair) and Elon — perform a looping, phase-offset zombie "Thriller" routine: hunched lurch, head rolls, a section LFO that blends the arms-up claw pose with an arms-forward reach, and a shuffling side-step, offset per dancer for a wave. Cinematic foggy graveyard: emissive full moon with glow sprite, starfield, gravestones and crosses, dead trees, drifting fog sprites, four sweeping coloured spotlights, periodic lightning flashes (auto + manual), ACES Filmic tone mapping, soft shadows cast by the moonlight and UnrealBloom. Auto cinematic orbit camera, toggleable to free OrbitControls. Verified rendering in-browser (CDN modules resolved, scene drawn) with no console errors.
